offer: For Amazon sellers processing 10–50 invoices/month, poor contract management causes missed discounts. We provide a vendor management platform instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in managing vendor contracts and performance metrics
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Amazon sellers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar issues
DM outreach to 20-50 Amazon sellers with demo video
Participate in forums where Amazon sellers share tools
try_it: Let users try contract tracking on 1-3 invoices
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Set default reminder schedules for users
Enable CSV import for existing vendor data
Streamline onboarding steps for new users
